movie.actors: Mark Wahlberg, Tim Roth, Helena Bonham Carter, Michael Clarke Duncan
movie.awards: Nominated for 2 BAFTA Film Awards. Another 10 wins & 27 nominations.
movie.plot: In 2029, an Air Force astronaut crash-lands on a mysterious planet where evolved, talking apes dominate a race of primitive humans.
movie.title: Planet of the Apes
movie.writer: Pierre Boulle (novel), William Broyles Jr. (screenplay), Lawrence Konner (screenplay), Mark Rosenthal (screenplay)
